directory_structure..storybook/: Storybook 8 configuration — main.ts, preview.ts, theme decorator for 4-theme switching
directory_structure.app/: Next.js App Router root — sitemap.ts, robots.ts, global layout
directory_structure.app/[locale]/: Locale-scoped pages and layouts (FR/EN via next-intl)
directory_structure.app/[locale]/experiments/: Experiments engine — category index and dynamic [category]/[feature] routes
directory_structure.app/[locale]/notes/: Notes engine — MDX editor (Tiptap) + viewer + note listing
directory_structure.app/[locale]/showroom/: Client-facing gallery with live previews and CTAs
directory_structure.app/[locale]/settings/: User preferences — theme picker, language toggle, agent config
directory_structure.app/api/: API route handlers — agents, contact form, experiment metadata
directory_structure.components/: Shared React components organized by domain
directory_structure.components/ui/: Atomic UI primitives built on Radix — Button, Card, Dialog, Input, etc.
directory_structure.components/layout/: App shell — Sidebar, Header, Footer, CommandPalette, Breadcrumbs, MobileNav
directory_structure.components/experiments/: Experiment-specific UI — ExperimentCard, ExperimentGrid, PropsPlayground, AutoDocs
directory_structure.components/notes/: Notes engine UI — TiptapEditor, MDXViewer, NoteSidebar, NoteCard
directory_structure.components/showroom/: Showroom UI — ShowroomCard, LivePreview, ThemeShowdown, PresentationMode
directory_structure.components/agents/: AI agent UI — ChatPanel, AgentCard, MessageBubble, StreamingIndicator
directory_structure.config/: Application configuration constants and static data
directory_structure.config/themes/: CSS theme files — one per theme, CSS custom properties definitions
directory_structure.config/agents/: Agent system prompts and configuration as TypeScript constants
directory_structure.experiments/: Experiment source files — isolated modules following /[category]/[feature]/ pattern
directory_structure.hooks/: Custom React hooks — useTheme, useAgent, useExperiments, useAutosave, etc.
directory_structure.lib/ai/: AI agent client utilities — createAgent, streaming helpers, rate limiting
directory_structure.lib/mdx/: MDX processing — compilation, component registry, frontmatter extraction
directory_structure.lib/utils/: General utilities — cn(), formatDate, debounce, etc.
directory_structure.lib/validations/: Zod schemas for forms, API routes, experiment metadata, agent outputs
directory_structure.messages/: i18n translation dictionaries — fr.json, en.json (~363 keys each)
directory_structure.public/: Static assets — favicon, og-image, robots.txt fallback
directory_structure.styles/: Global CSS — Tailwind imports, theme token definitions, base styles
directory_structure.types/: Shared TypeScript type definitions — experiments, notes, agents, themes

files.description: Storybook 8 main config — Next.js framework, addon registration (essentials, a11y, themes, interactions), story glob patterns including /experiments/
Storybook preview config — global decorators for ThemeProvider, i18n, viewport presets (375/768/1280), theme toolbar with 4 themes
Storybook decorator that wraps stories with data-theme attribute and CSS custom properties matching runtime behavior
Dynamic sitemap generator — enumerates all locale-prefixed pages, experiment detail pages, and notes (public only)
Dynamic robots.txt — allows all crawlers, references sitemap URL, disallows /api/ and /settings/
AI agent streaming endpoint — validates agentId (devops|ui-generator|business-strategist), loads system prompt from config, streams response via Vercel AI SDK
Contact form submission handler — Zod validation, rate limiting, email dispatch (or webhook)
Experiments metadata API — lists all experiments with category, status, tags. Used by search and showroom
Root locale layout — html lang attribute, ThemeProvider (next-themes with data-theme), NextIntlClientProvider, font injection (Geist, Inter, JetBrains Mono), global metadata, CSP nonce injection
Dashboard — hero metrics (total experiments, notes count, agent activity), recent experiments grid, quick actions panel, agent status cards
Root loading state — skeleton layout matching dashboard structure with pulsing placeholders
Custom 404 — themed empty state with search suggestion and navigation back to dashboard
Client error boundary — catches runtime errors, displays themed error state with retry action, logs to console in dev
Experiments index — category grid with search/filter bar, sorting controls (date, name, status), list/grid toggle (persisted in localStorage), experiment cards with theme-aware styling
Experiments loading state — skeleton grid of experiment cards
Category index — filtered experiments within a category, breadcrumb navigation, category description header
Experiment detail — live demo area, props playground (interactive controls), code preview (syntax highlighted), auto-docs panel, pricing badge, 'Request this feature' CTA, theme comparison toggle
Experiment detail loading — skeleton matching demo + docs split layout
Notes index — notes sidebar listing, MDX viewer for selected note, create new note FAB, search notes, tag filtering
Note detail/editor — Tiptap editor (write mode) or MDX rendered view (read mode), frontmatter display, linked experiments (backlinks), autosave indicator
Notes loading state — skeleton sidebar + content area
Showroom gallery — client-facing view with live previews, theme selector scoped per preview, CTA per experiment ('Request this feature'), presentation mode button, QR code for mobile preview
Showroom detail — fullscreen experiment preview, theme comparison (side-by-side 4 themes), experiment business card, CTA panel
Showroom loading state — skeleton gallery grid
Settings — theme picker (4-card visual grid), language toggle (FR/EN), agent configuration panel, profile preferences, data export
Settings loading state
Privacy policy — Loi 25 compliant, rendered from MDX template populated with brief-client.json legal variables. Bilingual content via next-intl.
Legal notices — company info, hosting provider (Vercel), intellectual property, liability limitations. Rendered from MDX template.
Button primitive — variants (primary, secondary, ghost, destructive), sizes (sm, md, lg), asChild pattern via Radix Slot, theme-aware via CSS custom properties
Storybook stories for Button — all variants, sizes, states, theme combinations
Button tests — render, click, disabled state, loading state, asChild rendering
Card container — header, content, footer slots, theme-aware border and surface colors, hover lift animation option
Card stories — default, hoverable, with header/footer, per-theme rendering
Input with label — error message display, required indicator, disabled state, theme-aware focus ring via CSS custom properties
Input stories — default, with error, disabled, various types
Dialog built on @radix-ui/react-dialog — overlay, content, title, description, close button, theme-aware surface and overlay colors, focus trap, keyboard escape
Dialog stories — default, with form content, nested content
Dropdown menu built on @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu — trigger, content, items, separators, keyboard navigation
Tabs built on @radix-ui/react-tabs — list, trigger, content, theme-aware active indicator
Tooltip built on @radix-ui/react-tooltip — provider, trigger, content, configurable delay and side
Select built on @radix-ui/react-select — trigger, content, items, theme-aware styling
Toggle switch built on @radix-ui/react-switch — theme-aware track and thumb colors
Toast notification system built on @radix-ui/react-toast — provider, viewport, variants (success, error, warning, info), auto-dismiss, theme-aware colors
Custom scrollbar built on @radix-ui/react-scroll-area — themed scrollbar track and thumb, used in sidebar and code preview panels
Status badge — variants (default, success, warning, error, outline), used for experiment status and pricing tiers
Loading skeleton — pulsing placeholder matching theme surface colors, configurable width/height/shape
Visual separator built on @radix-ui/react-separator — horizontal/vertical, theme-aware border color
Syntax-highlighted code block — copy button, language label, line numbers, theme-aware syntax colors via CSS custom properties
Empty state pattern — icon, title, description, action button. Used for no-experiments, no-notes, no-results states
Barrel export for all UI primitives — enables import { Button, Card, Input } from '@/components/ui'
Sidebar navigation — icon rail (64px) + expandable panel (200px), collapsible, 5 primary nav items (Dashboard, Experiments, Notes, Showroom, Settings), active state indicator, theme-aware colors
Sidebar stories — expanded, collapsed, with active item, per-theme
Top header bar — breadcrumbs slot, search trigger (CMD+K), theme indicator, language toggle, responsive
Footer — legal links (privacy policy, legal notices), copyright, language switcher, Mark Systems branding
CMD+K command palette — global search across experiments, notes, and settings. Built on Radix Dialog with custom search input, keyboard navigation, grouped results
CommandPalette stories — empty, with results, keyboard navigation
Breadcrumb navigation — auto-generated from route segments, i18n-aware labels, truncation for deep paths, schema.org BreadcrumbList structured data
Bottom navigation for mobile (<768px) — 5 icon items matching sidebar, active indicator, bottom-sheet drawer for secondary navigation
App shell wrapper — orchestrates Sidebar + Header + main content area + MobileNav. Handles responsive layout switching (sidebar on desktop, bottom nav on mobile)
Experiment preview card — thumbnail, title, category badge, status badge, theme-aware hover animation (lift + shadow), link to detail page
ExperimentCard stories — grid view, list view, various statuses, per-theme
ExperimentCard tests — renders metadata, link navigation, status badge display
Experiment grid/list layout — responsive grid with Framer Motion layout animations, stagger on enter, view mode toggle (grid/list)
Interactive props playground — auto-generates controls from TypeScript interface (toggle, select, text input, color picker per prop type), live preview updates
Auto-documentation panel — renders props table, usage examples, dependencies, bundle size from experiment metadata.json. Tabbed interface (Overview, Props, Usage, Pricing)
Code preview panel — syntax highlighted source code of the experiment component, copy button, filename tab, line numbers
Search and filter bar — text search with debounce, category chip filters, status filters, sort by (date, name, status)
Grid/List view toggle — persists preference to localStorage, built on Radix ToggleGroup

Tiptap rich-text editor — client-only (dynamic import), slash commands, inline floating toolbar (bold, italic, code, link, heading — max 7 actions), code blocks with syntax highlighting via lowlight, task lists, autosave with debounce (300ms)
TiptapEditor stories — empty, with content, with slash command open, per-theme
TiptapEditor tests — renders, types text, applies formatting, autosave triggers
MDX rendered view — compiles and renders MDX content with custom component mapping (headings, code blocks, links, images all themed), frontmatter display
Notes sidebar panel — note listing with search, tag filtering, sort by date/title, create new note button, active note highlight
Note list item — title, excerpt, date, tags, linked experiment indicator
Tiptap slash command dropdown — triggered by '/', lists available block types (heading, list, code, task, divider), keyboard navigable
Inline floating toolbar — appears on text selection, max 7 actions (bold, italic, code, link, heading toggle, strikethrough, clear formatting)
Showroom gallery card — live preview thumbnail, title, value proposition, pricing badge, 'Request this feature' CTA button
ShowroomCard stories — with pricing, without pricing, various themes
Isolated live preview frame — renders experiment component in a scoped container with independent theme, viewport toggle (375/768/1280), fullscreen mode button
Side-by-side theme comparison — renders same experiment in all 4 themes simultaneously, responsive grid (2x2 or 1x4)
Fullscreen presentation mode — no sidebar/chrome, keyboard navigation (arrow keys for next/prev experiment), escape to exit, theme selector overlay
One-page experiment summary — live preview, props doc summary, pricing tiers, Business-Strategist-written value proposition. Unique differentiator content piece.
QR code generator — generates QR code linking to mobile-optimized experiment preview URL
Viewport size toggle — 375px (mobile), 768px (tablet), 1280px (desktop) presets for live preview
Agent chat panel — streaming message display, input area with submit, agent avatar and name, message history, auto-scroll, theme-aware message bubbles
ChatPanel stories — empty, with messages, streaming state, per-agent
ChatPanel tests — renders messages, handles submit, displays streaming indicator
Agent summary card — avatar, name, 1-line description, capability list (5-7 bullets), status indicator (online/busy/offline), open chat action
Chat message bubble — user vs agent styling, MDX rendering for agent responses (code blocks, lists), timestamp, copy button
Streaming response indicator — animated dots or cursor, shown while agent is generating response
Loi 25 cookie consent banner — opt-in by default, accept/refuse/customize buttons, stores consent in cookie (strict SameSite), blocks analytics until accepted
CookieConsent tests — renders banner, handles accept/refuse, persists cookie, respects existing consent
Cookie preferences modal — granular consent toggles (necessary, analytics, functional), save preferences button, linked from consent banner 'customize'
Bento theme CSS custom properties — grid-focused layout tokens, editorial card borders (1.5px), warm surface colors, dark-first with light sepia variant
Cyberpunk theme CSS custom properties — background #05050A, neon cyan #00F5FF, violet #BF5AF2, green #39FF14, JetBrains Mono headings, glow borders, scanlines, dark-only enforced
Glassmorphism theme CSS custom properties — translucent surfaces (rgba 0.04-0.08), backdrop-blur 20px, chromatic indigo shadows, parallax depth tokens, dark-only
Minimalist theme CSS custom properties — baseline theme, indigo primary palette (#6366F1), maximum whitespace, minimal decorative elements, full dark + light mode support
Global design tokens shared across all themes — spacing scale, border-radius scale, typography scale (1.25 Major Third from 14px), z-index scale, transition durations, breakpoints
DevOps Agent system prompt and configuration — ~300 words defining role as infrastructure/CI/CD specialist, constraints (250 lines max, Vercel-first), capability definitions
UI-Generator Agent system prompt and configuration — ~400 words defining role as component designer, knowledge of 4 themes, Tailwind CSS 4 + Framer Motion output constraints
Business-Strategist Agent system prompt and configuration — ~350 words defining role as product/market analyst, pricing generation, go-to-market brief output format
Agent registry — exports all agent configs with ID, name, description, system prompt, capabilities array, model configuration
Experiment component template — standard boilerplate for new experiments: typed props interface, default export, max 250 lines, theme-aware styling via CSS custom properties
Experiment Storybook story template — default story, variants, theme decorator, controls matching props interface
Experiment test template — render test, props test, accessibility test (axe-core), snapshot test
Experiment metadata template — title, category, status (draft|beta|stable|deprecated), description, tags, theme_support array, created date, author, bundle_size, pricing config
Extended theme hook — wraps next-themes useTheme with typed theme values (bento|glassmorphism|minimalist|cyberpunk), dark-mode enforcement for cyberpunk, theme-specific CSS class helpers
Agent chat hook — wraps Vercel AI SDK useChat with agent-specific config, handles streaming, error states, rate limiting feedback, message history management
Experiments data hook — fetches and caches experiment metadata, supports filtering by category/status/tag, sorting, search
Autosave hook — debounced save (300ms), localStorage persistence, conflict detection for multi-tab editing, save status indicator (saving|saved|error)
Command palette hook — CMD+K listener, search index across experiments + notes + settings, keyboard navigation state
View preference hook — persists grid/list view mode to localStorage, returns current mode and toggle function
Responsive media query hook — SSR-safe, returns boolean for breakpoint matches, used for mobile nav switching
Agent factory — creates Vercel AI SDK agent instance from agent config, configures model, temperature, max tokens, streaming options
Agent rate limiter — token bucket per agent per session, configurable burst limit and refill rate, returns 429 with retry-after header
Zod schemas for agent structured outputs — pricing tiers, business case, component code, deployment config. Used with Vercel AI SDK structured output mode.
MDX compilation utility — compiles MDX string to renderable component, configures remark/rehype plugins, frontmatter extraction
MDX component registry — maps MDX elements (h1-h6, p, a, code, img, table) to themed UI components, ensures consistent rendering across notes and auto-docs
Frontmatter parser — extracts and validates frontmatter from MDX files using Zod schema, returns typed metadata object
Class name utility — merges Tailwind classes with conflict resolution (clsx + tailwind-merge pattern)
Date formatting utility — locale-aware date formatting (FR/EN), relative time ('il y a 2h' / '2h ago')
Debounce utility — generic debounce function used by autosave, search, and resize handlers
CSP nonce generator — crypto.randomUUID() based nonce for Content-Security-Policy header, used in middleware
Experiment metadata Zod schema — validates metadata.json structure: title, category, status enum, tags array, theme_support, pricing optional
Note Zod schema — validates note frontmatter: title, tags, linked experiments, created/updated dates, visibility (public/private)
Contact form Zod schema — validates name, email, message, honeypot field for spam prevention
Agent input/output Zod schemas — validates user prompt input (max length, sanitization), agent response structure per agent type
French translation dictionary — ~363 keys organized by namespace (dashboard, experiments, notes, showroom, settings, legal, agents, common, errors, toasts)
English translation dictionary — ~363 keys, exact mirror of fr.json structure
Favicon — Mark Systems logo, multi-size ICO
Open Graph default image — 1200x630, Mark Systems branding, used in social media previews

Global CSS entrypoint — Tailwind v4 @import directives, @theme token definitions referencing CSS custom properties, base reset, scrollbar styling, selection colors, prefers-reduced-motion global disable
Experiment types — Experiment, ExperimentMetadata, ExperimentCategory, ExperimentStatus (draft|beta|stable|deprecated), ExperimentPricing, ExperimentThemeSupport
Note types — Note, NoteFrontmatter, NoteVisibility (public|private), NoteTag, LinkedExperiment
Agent types — AgentId ('devops'|'ui-generator'|'business-strategist'), AgentConfig, AgentMessage, AgentCapability, AgentStatus
Theme types — ThemeName ('bento'|'glassmorphism'|'minimalist'|'cyberpunk'), ThemeMode ('light'|'dark'), ThemeTokens (typed CSS custom property keys)
i18n types — Locale ('fr'|'en'), typed message keys (auto-generated from fr.json structure via next-intl)
Navigation types — NavItem, BreadcrumbItem, CommandPaletteResult, ViewMode ('grid'|'list')
Next.js middleware — i18n locale detection and routing (next-intl), CSP nonce generation and header injection, theme cookie reading for FOWT prevention, security headers application
next-intl request configuration — getRequestConfig with locale validation, message loading from /messages/, time zone and number format defaults
next-intl routing configuration — defineRouting with locales ['fr', 'en'], defaultLocale 'fr', pathnames mapping for localized slugs
next-intl navigation utilities — createNavigation export providing Link, redirect, usePathname, useRouter with locale-aware behavior

Next.js configuration — App Router, poweredByHeader: false, security headers (X-Frame-Options DENY, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, Referrer-Policy, HSTS, Permissions-Policy), next-intl plugin, image domains, experimental features
TypeScript configuration — strict: true, noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true, exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true, paths alias @/ for absolute imports, include/exclude patterns
Package manifest — dependencies, devDependencies, scripts (dev, build, start, lint, test, storybook, storybook:build)
ESLint configuration — extends eslint-config-next and plugin:jsx-a11y/recommended, custom rules for import ordering and unused variables
Prettier configuration — singleQuote, trailingComma 'all', semi true, tabWidth 2, printWidth 100
Environment variables template — OPENAI_API_KEY (for agents), NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFAULT_LOCALE. No actual secrets committed.
Local environment variables — gitignored, developer populates from .env.example
Git ignore — node_modules, .next, .env.local, .env*.local, storybook-static, coverage, .vercel
Vitest configuration — jsdom environment, setup files, path aliases matching tsconfig, coverage thresholds
Vitest setup — @testing-library/jest-dom matchers, mock next/router, mock next-intl, mock next-themes

section_manifest.name: Dashboard Metrics
section_manifest.description: Hero metrics panel — total experiments count, notes count, agent activity summary, quick stats

section_manifest.name: Recent Experiments
section_manifest.description: Bento grid of recently updated/created experiments with quick preview thumbnails

section_manifest.name: Quick Actions
section_manifest.description: Quick action buttons — new experiment, new note, open showroom, agent panel

section_manifest.name: Agent Status Panel
section_manifest.description: Agent activity feed — status of 3 agents (online/busy/offline), recent agent interactions summary

section_manifest.name: Experiment Search Bar
section_manifest.description: Search input with debounce + category chip filters + status filters + sort controls

section_manifest.name: Category Filter
section_manifest.description: Category grid cards for browsing experiments by category

section_manifest.name: Experiment Grid
section_manifest.description: Responsive grid/list of experiment cards with Framer Motion stagger animation, view toggle

section_manifest.name: Experiment Demo
section_manifest.description: Live demo area rendering the experiment component with interactive controls

section_manifest.name: Props Playground
section_manifest.description: Interactive props control panel — auto-generated from TypeScript interface, real-time preview updates

section_manifest.name: Code Preview
section_manifest.description: Syntax-highlighted source code panel with copy button and file tabs

section_manifest.name: Auto Docs Panel
section_manifest.description: Auto-generated documentation — props table, usage examples, dependencies, bundle size. Tabbed (Overview, Props, Usage, Pricing)

section_manifest.name: Pricing Badge
section_manifest.description: Pricing tier display — free/pro/enterprise badges with feature comparison

section_manifest.name: Theme Showdown
section_manifest.description: Side-by-side comparison of the experiment rendered in all 4 themes (2x2 grid or 1x4 strip)

section_manifest.name: Note Sidebar
section_manifest.description: Notes listing sidebar — search, tag filter, sort, create button, active note highlight

section_manifest.name: Note Viewer
section_manifest.description: MDX rendered view of selected note — themed typography, code blocks, linked experiments

section_manifest.name: Note Search
section_manifest.description: Full-text search across notes content with highlighted results

section_manifest.name: Note Editor
section_manifest.description: Tiptap editor — slash commands, floating toolbar, code blocks, task lists, autosave

section_manifest.name: Note Frontmatter
section_manifest.description: Structured frontmatter form — title, tags, visibility, linked experiments (not raw YAML)

section_manifest.name: Note Backlinks
section_manifest.description: Bi-directional links panel — shows experiments and other notes that reference this note

section_manifest.name: Showroom Hero
section_manifest.description: Showroom intro section — headline, value proposition, presentation mode CTA

section_manifest.name: Showroom Gallery
section_manifest.description: Client-facing gallery grid — ShowroomCards with live previews, CTAs, pricing badges

section_manifest.name: Showroom Theme Selector
section_manifest.description: Theme picker scoped to showroom previews — 4-card visual grid, does not affect global app theme

section_manifest.name: Showroom Preview
section_manifest.description: Fullscreen experiment preview with viewport toggle and theme switcher

section_manifest.name: Experiment Business Card
section_manifest.description: One-page experiment summary — preview, docs, pricing, value prop. Unique differentiator.

section_manifest.name: Showroom CTA
section_manifest.description: Call-to-action panel — 'Request this feature' button, contact form trigger, QR code for mobile

section_manifest.name: Theme Picker
section_manifest.description: Visual theme selector — 4 cards with color swatches, active indicator, instant preview

section_manifest.name: Language Toggle
section_manifest.description: FR/EN language switcher with locale redirect

section_manifest.name: Agent Config
section_manifest.description: Agent configuration panel — model selection, temperature slider, max tokens per agent

section_manifest.name: Profile Settings
section_manifest.description: User profile preferences — display name, notification preferences

section_manifest.name: Data Export
section_manifest.description: Export panel — export experiments + docs + pricing as deliverable package (JSON + MDX)

section_manifest.name: Privacy Policy Content
section_manifest.description: Full Loi 25 privacy policy — templated MDX with variables from brief-client.json

section_manifest.name: Legal Notices Content
section_manifest.description: Legal notices — company info, hosting, IP, liability. Templated MDX.

section_manifest.name: Cookie Consent Banner
section_manifest.description: Loi 25 cookie consent — opt-in banner with accept/refuse/customize, blocks analytics until consent

section_manifest.name: App Sidebar Navigation
section_manifest.description: Icon rail (64px) + expandable panel (200px), 5 primary nav items, collapsible

section_manifest.name: Command Palette
section_manifest.description: CMD+K global search — experiments, notes, settings, keyboard navigable results

section_manifest.name: Header Bar
section_manifest.description: Top bar — breadcrumbs, search trigger, theme indicator, language toggle

section_manifest.name: Footer
section_manifest.description: Footer — legal links, copyright, language switcher, branding

section_manifest.name: Mobile Bottom Navigation
section_manifest.description: Bottom nav for <768px — 5 icon items, bottom-sheet drawer for secondary nav
